Whyos.description: The Whyos were a dominant street gang in New York City from the late 1860s to the early 1890s, formed from remnants of Five Points gangs after police crackdowns. They controlled much of Manhattan, engaging in street fighting, murder, robbery, and extortion. The gang was predominantly Irish and required members to have killed at least once. They were eventually defeated by the Monk Eastman Gang.

descriptions: The Whyos are stated as the main rivals of the Cherry Hill Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Their main rivals were the Whyos

descriptions: The Chichesters were absorbed by the Whyos after the American Civil War.
edges.evidence_quote: before being absorbed by the Whyos

descriptions: Infobox lists Whyos as a rival of Eastman Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Five Points Gang, Whyos, Yakey Yakes

descriptions: Five Points Gang absorbed remaining members of the Whyos.
edges.evidence_quote: Kelly recruited the remaining members of other Five Points gangs, such as the Dead Rabbits and Whyos, into his growing gang.

descriptions: Monk Eastman Gang defeated the Whyos, ending their dominance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Monk Eastman Gang defeated the last of the Whyos

descriptions: Whyos formed from members of the Chichesters.
edges.evidence_quote: Originally forming from members of the Chichesters

descriptions: Whyos had a gunfight with a Five Points gang member.
edges.evidence_quote: gunfight with rival Five Points gangster Johnny McCarthy

descriptions: Remo Lecce Libera sought independence except for 'Ndrangheta, implying alignment.
edges.evidence_quote: La Remo Lecce Libera richiedeva infatti l'indipendenza dei criminali leccesi da qualsiasi organizzazione criminale che non fosse la 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Remo Lecce Libera claims independence except from 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Remo Lecce Libera: formed by some leading criminal figures from Lecce, who claim to be independent from any criminal group other than the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Sacra Corona Unita suppressed Remo Lecce Libera, threatening and killing its members.
edges.evidence_quote: La Remo Lecce Libera richiedeva infatti l'indipendenza dei criminali leccesi da qualsiasi organizzazione criminale che non fosse la 'Ndrangheta ma venne stroncata sul nascere dalla Sacra Corona Unita , che minacciò pesantemente di uccidere i suoi affiliati, come infatti avvenne con l'omicidio di Donato Erpete nel 1989 .

descriptions: Remo Lecce Libera is an antagonistic group independent from SCU.
edges.evidence_quote: Remo Lecce Libera : formed by some leading criminal figures from Lecce, who claim to be independent from any criminal group other than the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Guardianes Morelenses is a splinter group of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Guardianes Morelenses en Morelos.

descriptions: Seven Stars is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seven Stars, 21 Boys

descriptions: Tribe is a support club of the Blue Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tribe, the BAMC's support club , was formed in Edinburgh in November 2011

descriptions: The Fertitta Group succeeded the Maceo Organization after the Maceo brothers' deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: After Sam and Rose's deaths in the early 1950s, the brothers were succeeded by the Fertitta Group

descriptions: The NMC was a Camorra organization founded by Alfieri to centralize the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992, Carmine Alfieri tentò di strutturare la Camorra campana in modo più centralizzato, ... Fondò la Nuova Mafia Campana (NMC)

descriptions: KIA and TNLA are both members of the Northern Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Northern Alliance—which consists of four insurgent groups, the Arakan Army (AA), the Kachin Independence Army (KIA), the Myanmar National Democratic Alliance Army (MNDAA) and the Ta'ang National Liberation Army (TNLA)

descriptions: MNDAA attacked TNLA, breaking their alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In mid-March 2026, the alliance between MNDAA and TNLA broke down over the issue of security cameras and to reopen the trade route to China. The MNDAA attacked TNLA-controlled Kutkai using drones and took the city on 16 March.

descriptions: MNDAA and TNLA are both members of the Northern Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Northern Alliance—which consists of four insurgent groups, the Arakan Army (AA), the Kachin Independence Army (KIA), the Myanmar National Democratic Alliance Army (MNDAA) and the Ta'ang National Liberation Army (TNLA)

descriptions: After conflict, MNDAA and TNLA pledged friendship and cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: On the 17th anniversary of the founding of the Arakan Army, the MNDAA and TNLA pledged to continue their friendship, as well as cooperate with the AA and to work together until the 'revolutionary vision' is achieved.

descriptions: MNDAA and TNLA conduct joint attacks against the Tatmadaw.
edges.evidence_quote: The MNDAA and Ta'ang National Liberation Army (TNLA) have carried out several joint attacks against the Tatmadaw in Shan State.

descriptions: TNLA received public support from KIA.
edges.evidence_quote: the TNLA received public support from ... other rebel groups like the KIA

descriptions: TNLA clashed regularly with RCSS before the coup.
edges.evidence_quote: Prior to the coup, the TNLA clashed regularly with the Restoration Council of Shan State over control of northern Shan state.

descriptions: TNLA received public support from United Wa State Army.
edges.evidence_quote: the TNLA received public support from other rebel groups like the KIA and United Wa State Army

descriptions: UWSA stopped providing weapons to TNLA in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: the UWSA declared that they would no longer provide weapons or financial aid to the TNLA, MNDAA, and Shan State Army - North

'Ndrina Rosmini.description: The Rosmini are a powerful 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, controlling the neighborhoods of Ciccarello, Modena, and San Giorgio. They have strong ties to the De Stefano family and extensive interests in Lombardy. The clan has been involved in the second 'ndrangheta war and is known for controlling public contracts in Reggio Calabria. Key members include Diego Rosmini, who held the rank of 'santa', and Antonio Rosmini, arrested in 2004 after a decade-long fugitive status.

descriptions: The Barreca were opposed to the Rosmini in the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i De Stefano capeggiati da Orazio De Stefano insieme ai Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca contro gli Imerti , i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino .

descriptions: Members of Condello and Rosmini were arrested together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: i carabinieri compiono 42 arresti ... nei confronti di presunti esponenti dei Condello, e ... i Rosmini

descriptions: Condello's faction was allied with the Rosmini clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: Rosmini 'ndrina was a rival in the second war.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991): Condello , Imerti , Serraino 'ndrina and Rosmini 'ndrina

descriptions: Rosmini is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Rosmini

descriptions: The Rosmini clan allied with the Imerti during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Lo Giudice allied with Rosmini during the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta i Lo Giudice si schierarono con gli Imerti - Condello - Serraino - Rosmini .

descriptions: Rosmini is currently very close to the De Stefano family.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Rosmini attualmente sembra essere molto legata alla famiglia De Stefano.

descriptions: Rosmini allied with the Condello-Imerti-Serraino group during the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierarono con il gruppo Condello - Imerti - Serraino.

descriptions: The Serraino sided with the Rosmini during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta si schierano con i Condello - Imerti - Rosmini .

descriptions: Latella 'ndrina allied with Rosmini in 2013 to control construction.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2013, investigations discovered that the Latella 'ndrina, together with the Rosmini, Serraino, Audino, and Nicolò 'ndrine, formed an alliance to control the construction sector

descriptions: Infoboox lists Young Gooch as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Young Gooch

descriptions: Young Gooch is an offshoot of Gooch Close Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1996, an offshoot gang was identified (Young Gooch)

descriptions: Young Gooch was in conflict with Longsight Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: The Young Gooch started to war with the newly emerging Longsight Crew

descriptions: SLM (al-Nur) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (al-Nur)

descriptions: Outlaws merged with Gypsy Raiders.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws merged with the Gypsy Raiders motorcycle gang of Louisville in August 1964.

descriptions: Outlaws merged with Gypsy Raiders in 1964.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1964, the Outlaws merged with the Cult biker club from Voorheesville, New York, the Gypsy Outlaws of Milwaukee, and the Gypsy Raiders in Louisville, Kentucky, becoming the largest "one percenter" club east of the Mississippi River

descriptions: The gang considered themselves the inner core of M-KA.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang referred to themselves as the inner core of three organizations named ... Manifest-Kommunistisk Arbejdsgruppe

descriptions: The Commission ordered the murder of Dutch Schultz after he disobeyed their refusal to kill Dewey.
edges.evidence_quote: Schultz asked the Commission, the governing body of the American Mafia, for permission to kill Dewey, in an attempt to avert his conviction. They refused. When Schultz disobeyed them and made an attempt to kill Dewey, the Commission ordered his murder in 1935.

descriptions: Head Hunters absorbed Sinn Fein MC by patching over in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: The Head Hunters "patched over" the Wellington-based Sinn Fein MC in 2011

descriptions: Lone Legion is a member of the A-Team alliance with Sinn Fein MC.
edges.evidence_quote: According to media and Police the club is a member of the "A-Team", an alliance between several NZ biker groups including the Outcasts MC, the Epitaph Riders MC, the Forty-Fives MC, the Southern Vikings MC, Satan's Slaves MC, Sinn Fein MC and the Lost Breed MC .

descriptions: Issei Boys is a sub-group of Tokyo Boyz.
edges.evidence_quote: They were split into three groups/ranks, The Kibei Boys (Japanese-Americans from Japan), Issei Boys (1st generation Japanese-Americans), and the Nisei Boys (2nd generation Japanese-Americans).

descriptions: Kutaisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.

descriptions: Kutaisi and Tbilisi clans are in a violent feud.
edges.evidence_quote: the Georgian underworld in Russia, Georgia and elsewhere has been characterized by a violent feud between the Kutaisi and Tbilisi clans, led by Tariel Oniani and Aslan Usoyan, respectively.

descriptions: Bubbo killed Alberto Carpino of Trataculo, leading to a retaliation attempt by Trataculo against Bubbo.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 febbraio 2000 viene ucciso a Petronà Alberto Carpino della 'ndrina dei Trataculo. Come ritorsione, nel 2001, due loro affiliati ... sarebbero stati in procinto di andare a Galbiate per eliminare Filippo Bubbo

Henry Street Gang.description: The Henry Street Gang was a Chicago street gang formed by Chris Merry in the early 1890s. Based in Chicago's Southwest Side, they committed armed robbery against local merchants and street peddlers, often posing as push cart vendors. They developed a robbery method called the 'kick in' and operated for several years until Merry was hanged for murdering his wife, after which the gang dissolved.

Dojin-kai.description: The Dojin-kai is a yakuza organization headquartered in Kurume, Fukuoka, Japan, founded in 1971 by Isoji Koga. It is a designated yakuza syndicate with approximately 310 members, known for its militant nature and large-scale drug trafficking, particularly methamphetamine. The group has been involved in violent conflicts with other yakuza groups, including the Yamaguchi-gumi and its own splinter group, Kyushu Seido-kai.

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Kudo-kai as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Kumamoto-kai as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Dojin-kai has been in a violent conflict with its splinter group Kyushu Seido-kai since 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dojin-kai again started a blatantly vicious conflict with its splinter group, Kyushu Seido-kai, in 2006.

descriptions: Dojin-kai considers Namikawa-kai a rival as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: The Namikawa-kai and the Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai is a splinter group of Dojin-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dojin-kai again started a blatantly vicious conflict with its splinter group, Kyushu Seido-kai, in 2006.

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Sinaloa cartel as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Dojin-kai had a brief conflict with Sumiyoshi Union in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: Another notable one is a brief conflict that occurred in 1983, with the Kanto-based large yakuza syndicate Sumiyoshi Union

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Taishu-kai as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Dojin-kai fought the Yamaguchi-gumi in the Yama-Michi War (1986-1987) and considers them rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The Dojin-kai is noted for having been isolated in the yakuza world...

descriptions: Dojin-kai considers Yamaguchi-gumi a rival as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: The Namikawa-kai and the Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Dojin-kai is part of a federation that opposes the Yamaguchi-gumi, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the ... Kurume -based Dojin-kai

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Dojin-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with four different Yamaguchi-affiliates over the concessions of Nakasu , the largest red-light district in Kyushu, and also with the Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai over their attempts to enter the same territory.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Dojin-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai engaged in armed conflicts with its former parent syndicate Dojin-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Since its formation, the Kyushu Seido-kai has been known for its blatant armed conflicts with its former parent syndicate, the Dojin-kai

descriptions: Kyushu Seido-kai ended its gang war with Dojin-kai and dissolved.
edges.evidence_quote: On June 11, 2013, Kyushu Seido-kai announced the end of its gang war with Dojin-kai as well as its dissolution.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Dojin-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Dojin-kai attacked Toa-kai after Toa-kai refused to cooperate in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: the Dojin-kai attempted to compel the Toa-kai to co-operate in drug trafficking but the Toa-kai rejected it and then the mass attacks started

descriptions: Dojin-kai attempted expansion into Okinawa with heavy violence, contrasting with Toa-kai's gentle stance.
edges.evidence_quote: The reason why the Toa-kai has been able to be active on the island may be because the group has historically been more oriented to legitimate businesses, and of its gentle stance, in contrast to other yakuza syndicates which have attempted to expand their influences into Okinawa with heavy violence, such as the Yamaguchi-gumi and especially the Dojin-kai .

descriptions: Outlaws recruited former members of the Night Sinners.
edges.evidence_quote: The chapter also recruited several former members of the Night Sinners, a defunct biker gang in Waukegan

descriptions: Norfolk Street Bulls are listed as rivals of Lucerne Street Doggz.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norfolk street Bulls, Morse Street County

edges.target: Front for the Advancement and Progress of Haïti
descriptions: FRAPH was a paramilitary group spawned from the Macoutes, described as modern Tonton Macoutes.
edges.evidence_quote: The most feared paramilitary group during the 1990s was the Front for the Advancement and Progress of Haïti (FRAPH), which Toronto Star journalist Linda Diebel described as modern Tonton Macoutes, and not the legitimate political party it claimed to be.

descriptions: The Rhodes Gang was an ally of the Gopher Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Battle Row Ladies' Social and Athletic Club , Parlor Mob , Gorillas , Rhodes Gang

Terceiro Comando.description: Brazilian criminal faction based in Rio de Janeiro, founded in 1988 to oppose the Comando Vermelho. It was formed by Jorge Zambi (Pianinho) and other former members of the Falange Vermelha. The group was involved in drug trafficking, murders, and prison rebellions. It was dissolved in the early 2000s after a rebellion led by Comando Vermelho leader Fernandinho Beira-Mar killed its main leaders.

descriptions: ADA initially allied with Terceiro Comando.
edges.evidence_quote: Inicialmente, o Amigos dos Amigos aliou-se ao Terceiro Comando (TC);

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with TC, which splintered from CV.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as ... Terceiro Comando (TC), the latter itself the result of a power struggle between Comando Vermelho leaders in the mid-1980s.

descriptions: Comando Vermelho has fought in conflicts with TC, which originated from a split within CV.
edges.evidence_quote: It has fought in several small-scale conflicts with rival gangs such as ... Terceiro Comando (TC), the latter itself the result of a power struggle between Comando Vermelho leaders in the mid-1980s.

descriptions: Terceiro Comando and ADA formed an alliance in 1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Com a criação da facção ADA (Amigos dos Amigos) , em 1994 , ambas às organizações firmam uma aliança.

descriptions: TC e ADA formaram aliança em 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 1998, o Terceiro Comando (TC) aliou-se a facção recém-criada Amigos dos Amigos (ADA)

descriptions: Terceiro Comando fought conflicts with Comando Vermelho in 2001 and 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: The Terceiro Comando has fought several small-scale conflicts (in 2001 and 2004) with the rival gang Comando Vermelho.

descriptions: Terceiro Comando was created to oppose Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: surgida para se opor ao Comando Vermelho em 1988

descriptions: Terceiro Comando was a break-away faction of Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: founded in the early 1980s as a break-away faction of the § Red Command

descriptions: Terceiro Comando was formed as a splinter group from Comando Vermelho.
edges.evidence_quote: It was founded in the early 1980s and is a break-away faction of the Comando Vermelho.

descriptions: Terceiro Comando may have originated as a dissident group from Falange Jacaré.
edges.evidence_quote: pode ter sido criado de uma dissidência de uma das falanges que controlavam a prisão de Ilha Grande, provavelmente a Falange Jacaré

descriptions: Terceiro Comando's members joined Terceiro Comando Puro after its disappearance.
edges.evidence_quote: most of its members have joined § Terceiro Comando Puro

descriptions: TCP is a dissident faction that split from Terceiro Comando.
edges.evidence_quote: em 2002, um racha nessa organização levou à divisão de seus integrantes entre o Amigos dos Amigos e o Terceiro Comando Puro (TCP), uma dissidência

descriptions: Terceiro Comando Puro is a dissident faction of Terceiro Comando.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 2002, surgiu uma dissidência, o Terceiro Comando Puro

descriptions: TCP split off from Terceiro Comando.
edges.evidence_quote: a Rio de Janeiro group that split off from § Terceiro Comando in 2002

descriptions: TCP split off from TC in 2002 and later absorbed its members.
edges.evidence_quote: Terceiro Comando Puro ( Pure Third Command , TCP ) is a Brazilian criminal organization in Rio de Janeiro that split off from the Terceiro Comando (TC) in 2002 due to disputes about TC's affiliations with the Amigos dos Amigos gang.

descriptions: TCP originou-se como dissidência do Terceiro Comando.
edges.evidence_quote: surgida no Rio de Janeiro, a partir de uma dissidência do Terceiro Comando

descriptions: Jido-kai is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Crips made incursions into L.A. Brims territory, leading to formation of Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: Para responder a las incursiones de los Crips, muchas pandillas pequeñas se unieron y los bloods fueron parte de ellas.
